policies.name: waf-sqli-detection
policies.description: Block queries with SQL injection patterns (tautology, UNION, stacked, blind)
policies.reason: SQL injection pattern detected

policies.name: waf-block-schema-enumeration
policies.description: Block metadata/schema reconnaissance by non-DBA
policies.reason: Schema/metadata enumeration blocked — contact DBA

policies.name: waf-block-comment-injection
policies.description: Block queries with dangerous keywords hidden in comments
policies.reason: Suspicious query pattern — possible comment injection

policies.name: waf-block-ddl-non-dba
policies.description: Only DBA can run destructive DDL (DROP, TRUNCATE, ALTER)
policies.reason: DROP requires DBA role

policies.name: waf-block-truncate
policies.description: Block TRUNCATE for non-DBA
policies.reason: TRUNCATE requires DBA role

policies.name: waf-block-alter-table-non-dba
policies.description: Block ALTER TABLE for non-DBA
policies.reason: Schema modifications require DBA role

policies.name: waf-block-delete-no-where
policies.description: Block DELETE without WHERE clause
policies.reason: DELETE without WHERE clause is prohibited

policies.name: waf-block-update-no-where
policies.description: Block UPDATE without WHERE clause
policies.reason: UPDATE without WHERE clause is prohibited

policies.name: waf-block-oversized-queries
policies.description: Block abnormally large SQL (possible payload injection)
policies.reason: Query exceeds maximum length (8KB) — possible injection payload

policies.name: waf-block-excessive-joins
policies.description: Block queries joining too many tables (anti-join-bomb)
policies.reason: Query joins too many tables (max 8) — possible resource exhaustion

policies.name: waf-block-excessive-tables
policies.description: Block queries touching too many tables
policies.reason: Query accesses too many tables (max 10)

policies.name: waf-block-expensive-queries
policies.description: Block queries with high cost score for non-DBA
policies.reason: Query too expensive — optimize or contact DBA

policies.name: waf-row-limit
policies.description: Limit result sets for non-DBA users

policies.name: waf-block-dcl-non-dba
policies.description: Block privilege changes (GRANT/REVOKE) for non-DBA
policies.reason: Privilege management requires DBA role

policies.name: waf-block-user-management
policies.description: Block user/role creation and modification
policies.reason: User/role management requires DBA role

policies.name: waf-block-system-commands
policies.description: Block system-level operations (file access, shell commands)
policies.reason: System-level operations are prohibited

policies.name: waf-readonly-enforcement
policies.description: Read-only users cannot write or modify schema
policies.reason: Read-only access — write operations not permitted

policies.name: waf-contractor-office-hours
policies.description: Contractors allowed only during business hours (Mon-Fri 08-19)
policies.reason: Contractor access outside business hours not permitted

policies.name: waf-contractor-readonly
policies.description: Contractors cannot modify data
policies.reason: Contractor access is read-only

policies.name: waf-production-ip-restriction
policies.description: Production access only from internal network
policies.reason: Production access restricted to internal network

policies.name: waf-rate-limit-contractors
policies.description: Rate limit contractor queries (5 qps, burst 10)

policies.name: waf-rate-limit-services
policies.description: Rate limit service accounts (100 qps, burst 200)

policies.name: waf-protect-credentials-table
policies.description: Block non-DBA access to credential/password tables
policies.reason: Access to credential tables requires DBA role

policies.name: waf-protect-audit-tables
policies.description: Prevent modification of audit/log tables
policies.reason: Audit log modification prohibited — tamper protection

policies.name: waf-mask-pii-support
policies.description: Mask PII for support team

policies.name: waf-mask-finance-restricted
policies.description: Only finance/DBA can see compensation data
policies.reason: Financial data restricted to finance team

policies.name: waf-mask-contractor-all-pii
policies.description: Contractors see all PII masked

policies.name: waf-allow-reads
policies.description: Allow reads with standard logging

policies.name: waf-allow-writes
policies.description: Allow writes with verbose logging

policies.name: waf-allow-transaction
policies.description: Allow transaction control

policies.name: waf-default-audit
policies.description: Default: allow with full audit
